spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate({"span.metrics.duration_bucket", "service.name"=~"$service_name", "service.version"=~"$service_version", "service.namespace"=~"$service_namespace", "span.kind"="$span_kind", "span.name"=~"$span_name"}[$__rate_interval]) or on() vector(0)) by (le, "span.name"))
